concept-religious-cosmology.title: Religious Cosmology

concept-zoroastrian-cosmology.title: Zoroastrian Cosmology

concept-biblical-cosmology.title: Biblical Cosmology

concept-buddhist-cosmology.title: Buddhist Cosmology
concept-buddhist-cosmology.summary: Buddhist view of eternal, cyclic universe with six realms of rebirth and no creator god

concept-hindu-cosmology.title: Hindu Cosmology
concept-hindu-cosmology.summary: Hindu cyclic cosmology with Yuga time scales, multiple lokas, and diverse creation theories

concept-jain-cosmology.title: Jain Cosmology
concept-jain-cosmology.summary: Jain view of universe as uncreated, eternal entity with human-like shape and no creator

concept-chinese-cosmology.title: Chinese Cosmology
concept-chinese-cosmology.summary: Chinese cosmology with Wuji, Taiji, Wuxing, Yin-Yang, and Pangu creation legend

concept-gnosticism.title: Gnosticism
concept-gnosticism.summary: Gnostic dualistic cosmology with Pleroma (higher Light world) distinct from material world

entity-serer-religion.title: Serer Religion
entity-serer-religion.summary: African religion with creator deity Roog and Sirius star (Yoonir) as universe symbol
